testcase.name: test_01_express_void_all_items_releases_table
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_void_releases_table.py:70: in test_01_express_void_all_items_releases_table assert table_before["status"] == "free", f"Expected table to be free, got {table_before['status']}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'status'

testcase.name: test_02_partial_void_does_NOT_release_table
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_void_releases_table.py:181: in test_02_partial_void_does_NOT_release_table assert table_after["status"] == "occupied", f"Table should remain occupied, got {table_after['status']}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'status'

testcase.name: test_order_with_items_added_later_then_all_voided

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have at least 2 items assert 1 >= 2 + where 1 = len(['8e20b61e-746d-4138-bcca-f20c41b847a0'])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_void_releases_table.py:474: in test_order_with_items_added_later_then_all_voided assert len(all_item_ids) >= 2, "Should have at least 2 items" E AssertionError: Should have at least 2 items E assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = len(['8e20b61e-746d-4138-bcca-f20c41b847a0'])
